fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item for which sales prices are being changed or set up.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the sales price.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the earliest date on which the item can be sold at the sales price.

fields.name: Current Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit price of the item.

fields.name: New Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new unit price that is valid for the selected combination of Sales Code, Currency Code and/or Starting Date.

fields.name: Price Includes VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the sales price includes VAT.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if an invoice discount will be calculated when the sales price is offered.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Gr. (Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of customers for whom the sales prices will apply.

fields.name: Sales Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of sale that the price is based on, such as All Customers or Campaign.

fields.name: Minimum Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum sales quantity that must be met to warrant the sales price.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the sales price agreement ends.

fields.name: Item Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item on the worksheet line.

fields.name: Sales Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the sales type, such as Campaign, on the worksheet line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a line discount will be calculated when the sales price is offered.
